name: Metal Mage
description: Metal Mage is a scrapped Skylander, turned single use enemy, in Skylanders: Trap Team. He is a wizard troll with an Air themed headdress and metal staves, with the ability to create barriers around its allies, and like Broccoli Guys and Rage Mages, holds treasure over his head.
biography: Metal Mage is a scrapped Skylander, turned single use enemy, in Skylanders: Trap Team. He is a wizard troll with an Air themed headdress and metal staves, with the ability to create barriers around its allies, and like Broccoli Guys and Rage Mages, holds treasure over his head. Vimeo demo reels and Skylanders: Giants behind-the-scenes footage were the only hints that this character had a bigger role for some time, until Nat Loh's character design portfolio had more details. Though they first started as inspired by Boomer, the developer received the concept art for Rocky Roll instead and worked Metal Mage's abilities into them. His abilities involved creating metal balls that he could combine into various weapons such as a giant metal hammer or a metal battering ram.
personality: As a support-focused wizard, the Metal Mage is dedicated to the protection of his comrades, utilizing defensive magic to control the battlefield.

story.content: Vimeo demo reels and Skylanders: Giants behind-the-scenes footage were the only hints that this character had a bigger role for some time, until Nat Loh's character design portfolio had more details. Though they first started as inspired by Boomer, the developer received the concept art for Rocky Roll instead and worked Metal Mage's abilities into them. His abilities involved creating metal balls that he could combine into various weapons such as a giant metal hammer or a metal battering ram.
In the final game of Trap Team, Metal Mage appears only once, in Mystic Mill, to briefly provide support for the Evilikin in one of the gates.

content: His abilities involved creating metal balls that he could combine into various weapons such as a giant metal hammer or a metal battering ram.

trivia: Had Metal Mage actually been playable, he would've been the first character with metal abilities not in Tech.
He would have also been the second Troll to be a Skylander.
Though he carries a dagger, he's incapable of attacking with it in his enemy form, nor is it mentioned in the development info for Rocky Roll.
He has the same red skin as troll Nightmare Villains, though he doesn't wear any purple or red outfits.
Unlike every other Troll, he also doesn't have an apparent nose.
gameplay: In Skylanders: Trap Team, the Metal Mage functions as a support unit in the Mystic Mill stage, casting Electric Shield to defend Evilikin allies. He is one of the few enemies that holds treasure over his head. Scrapped gameplay elements for the character included the ability to forge large metal weapons from conjured spheres such as a giant hammer or battering ram.

basic.name: Electric Shield
basic.content: The ability to create barriers around its allies.

basic.name: Metal Ball Conjuration
basic.content: Creating metal balls that he could combine into various weapons such as a giant metal hammer or a metal battering ram.

soulgems.content: A giant metal hammer created from combined metal balls.

wow_pows.content: A metal battering ram created from combined metal balls.
